study_title: Sex-specific development in haplodiploid honeybee is controlled by the female-embryo-specific activation of thousands of intronic lncRNAs
The evolution of small RNA pathways across the arthropods
design: Total RNA extracted using the mirVana miRNA Isolation kit (Ambion) according to manufacturers instructions, ribosomal RNA removed using the Ribo-Zero rRNA Removal Kit (Human/Mouse/Rate; Illumina) according to manufacturers instructions, and strand-specific RNA-Seq libraries synthesized as described in Zhang et al 2012 (10.1186/1758-907X-3-9)
